member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgErrorCorrectionLevel
member.summary: Error correction level for QR code encoding. Higher levels provide more error recovery but reduce data capacity.

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgErrorCorrectionLevel.L
member.summary: Low - recovers approximately 7% of data

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgErrorCorrectionLevel.M
member.summary: Medium - recovers approximately 15% of data (recommended default)

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgErrorCorrectionLevel.Q
member.summary: Quartile - recovers approximately 25% of data

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgErrorCorrectionLevel.H
member.summary: High - recovers approximately 30% of data

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for SVG rendering of QR codes.

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions.ForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the foreground (dark module) color as a CSS color string. Default is "#000000" (black).

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background (light module) color as a CSS color string. Default is "#ffffff" (white).

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions.ModuleSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of each module (cell) in SVG units. Default is 10.

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions.QuietZone
member.summary: Gets or sets the quiet zone (border) size in modules around the QR code. Default is 1.

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions.IncludeXmlDeclaration
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to include the XML declaration at the start of the SVG output. Default is true.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCode
member.summary: High-level API for generating QR codes as SVG markup.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCode.Generate(System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCodeOptions,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions)
member.summary: Generates a QR code as a complete SVG document string.
member.param: The text to encode in the QR code. Cannot be null or empty.
Optional QR generation options (error correction, quiet zone).
Optional SVG rendering options (colors, module size).
member.returns: A string containing the SVG markup for the QR code.
member.exception: Thrown when text is empty or exceeds QR code capacity.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCode.GenerateInline(System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCodeOptions,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions)
member.summary: Generates a QR code as inline SVG markup (no XML declaration), suitable for embedding in HTML.
member.param: The text to encode in the QR code. Cannot be null or empty.
Optional QR generation options (error correction, quiet zone).
Optional SVG rendering options (colors, module size).
member.returns: A string containing the inline SVG markup for the QR code.
member.exception: Thrown when text is empty or exceeds QR code capacity.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCodeOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for QR code generation in the SVG package.

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCodeOptions.ErrorCorrection
member.summary: Gets or sets the error correction level for the QR code. Higher levels allow more data recovery if the code is damaged, but reduce capacity. Default is M (medium, ~15% recovery).

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgQRCodeOptions.QuietZoneSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the quiet zone (border) around the QR code in modules. QR spec recommends at least 4, but 1 works for most scanners. Default is 1.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgRenderer
member.summary: Renders a QR code boolean matrix as SVG markup.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgRenderer.GenerateSvg(System.Boolean[0:,0:],ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions)
member.summary: Generates a complete SVG document from a QR code matrix.
member.param: A 2D boolean array where true represents a dark module.
member.returns: A string containing the SVG markup.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgRenderer.GenerateSvgInline(System.Boolean[0:,0:],ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Svg.SvgOptions)
member.summary: Generates SVG markup without the XML declaration, suitable for inline embedding in HTML.
member.param: A 2D boolean array where true represents a dark module.
member.returns: A string containing the SVG markup without an XML declaration.
